name: Mark O'Connor
abstract: Mark O'Connor (born August 5, 1961) is an American fiddle player, composer, guitarist, and mandolinist whose music combines bluegrass, country, jazz and classical. A three-time Grammy Award winner, he has won six Country Music Association Musician Of The Year awards and was a member of three influential musical ensembles: the David Grism…

about_quotes.speaker: Jane Monheit
about_quotes.evidence: I worked a lot with Béla Fleck and Mark O’Connor and her early albums which I just loved.
